name: vscode-scss
description: Advanced autocompletion, hover, and go-to-definition for SCSS in Angular projects

scss.scannerDepth.description: The maximum number of nested directories to scan.

scss.scannerExclude.description: List of glob patterns for directories that are excluded when scanning.

scss.scanImportedFiles.description: Eagerly follow @import/@use/@forward edges during the initial workspace scan, to warm the cache with files the scss glob might have missed. Does not control which symbols are suggested for a given file — that's decided by its own @use/@import chain plus scss.customProperties.scope for CSS custom properties.

scss.suggestFunctionsInStringContextAfte.description: Allows prompt Functions in String context after specified symbols.

scss.dev.serverPort.description: The port that SCSS IntelliSense server listens to. Can be used for attaching to the server Node process for debugging / profiling.

scss.angular.includePaths.description: Extra directories (workspace-relative or absolute) to search for bare-specifier @use/@import/@forward targets, in addition to angular.json's own stylePreprocessorOptions.includePaths. Entries resolving outside the current workspace folder are ignored.

scss.customProperties.scope.description: Controls which CSS custom properties (--x) are suggested/resolved across files. "workspace": any --x declared anywhere is available everywhere (matches real CSS cascade behavior). "root-selectors": only --x declared inside a :root/html/body selector counts as global.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run lint && npm run compile && npm test
scripts.watch: npm run clean && npm run lint && tsc --watch
